heading: Disposal of surplus buffalo and elk
label: 141c Disposal of surplus buffalo and elk
notes: CodificationSubsecs. (a) and (b) of this section constitute sections 1 and 2, respectively, of act .June 16, 1938

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized, in his discretion and under regulations to be prescribed by him, to sell or otherwise dispose of the surplus buffalo and elk of the Wind Cave National Park herd.

children.label: b
children.text: All moneys received from the sale of any such surplus animals, or products thereof, shall be deposited in the Treasury of the United States as miscellaneous receipts.
